name: Gemini Live Voice Channel
description: Real-time voice conversation via Google Gemini 3.1 Flash Live (gemini-3.1-flash-live-preview). Runs a WebSocket server that accepts audio from a phone call or microphone, streams to Gemini Live API with function calling, and returns synthesized audio. Free via Google AI Studio API key.

geminiApiKey.description: Google AI Studio API key (reads from GEMINI_API_KEY env var)

voicePort.description: Local port for the voice WebSocket server (default: 3001)

allowedPhoneNumbers.description: Phone numbers allowed to connect (e.g. ['+15551234567']). Empty = localhost only.
